title: Use research/inbox.jsonl as the canonical injected-question surface
summary: Model injected questions as append-only records with identity, origin, source, injectedAtIteration, promotedAtIteration, and promotedQuestionId instead of anonymous strategy bullets.

title: Carry per-entry provenance when promoting inbox records into registry questions
summary: Promotion should copy source and injectedAtIteration into registry.openQuestions and keep it when the item resolves.

title: Render an injected-questions block for visibility, not as source-of-truth state
summary: Use a generated display anchor for pending injected angles while keeping canonical records in inbox JSONL.

title: Import direct key-questions bullets as legacy records before rendering from state
summary: Detect unregistered strategy bullets, assign legacy provenance once, and then preserve identity through future reducer rewrites.
Direct provenance comments in key-questions are not durable because the reducer parses only checkbox state and text, then replaces the full anchor on each run.
This builds on the general S2-11 provenance theme but is new target-mapping for injected question ingestion and promotion.
